testcase.name: test_warmup_count_clamped_low

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 30 == 1 + where 30 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa2f92dec400>('queued') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa2f92dec400> = {'queued': 30, 'started': True, 'started_at': '2026-04-28T20:05:19.094458+00:00'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration66_magic_link_warmup.py:142: in test_warmup_count_clamped_low assert body.get("queued") == 1 E AssertionError: assert 30 == 1 E + where 30 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa2f92dec400>('queued') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa2f92dec400> = {'queued': 30, 'started': True, 'started_at': '2026-04-28T20:05:19.094458+00:00'}.get

testcase.name: test_warmup_count_clamped_high

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='care-matcher-1.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)

testcase.failure:
